---
title: "Agentic Basics"
author: "Pingfan Hu & John Helveston"
---

## Welcome

Part 1 of the 2026 Agentic Engineering Workshop.

## Agenda

- What is Claude Code
- Installing and running it
- Your first session

## What is Claude Code

Claude Code is Anthropic's official CLI for agentic coding tasks.

## Your First Session

```bash
claude
```

That's it. Ask it anything about your repo.
